title: Assam Science and Technology University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Assam Science and Technology University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Assam Science and Technology University Result 2026 Out for 7th Semester B.Tech and 1st and 3rd Semester M.Sc Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics on the official website - astu.ac.in on 08-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Assam Science and Technology University result.

content.text: Assam Science and Technology University has officially released ASTU Exam Result 2026 for multiple undergraduate and postgraduate semester examinations. The latest result update includes B.Tech 7th Semester (Regular and Repeater) 2025 results and M.Sc 1st and 3rd Semester End Semester Examination results for Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics held in Nov-Dec 2025 for JIST.ASTU Result 2026 has been published online on the official website - astu.ac.in.

Students can visit the official results page at https://astu.ac.in/?page_id=116 and open the relevant result notice to access their marksheet or online result page using their roll number, registration number or other required credentials.After downloading the result, candidates should carefully verify their name, roll number, semester, subject-wise marks and result status. In case of any discrepancy in the published scorecard, students should contact the university examination branch or their institute immediately for clarification and correction.

sections.heading: Assam Science and Technology University Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: ASTU has declared fresh semester results for engineering and postgraduate science programmes through its official result section. The current update covers B.Tech 7th Semester Regular and Repeater examinations and M.Sc 1st and 3rd Semester Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics results for JIST students.

rows: B.Tech, M.Sc Physics, M.Sc Chemistry, M.Sc Mathematics
Jorhat Institute of Science and Technology (JIST)

sections.heading: Assam Science and Technology University Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: ASTU has activated direct links and notices for the latest semester examination results on its official portal. Students can use the links below to access the B.Tech 7th Semester result notice and the M.Sc 1st and 3rd Semester result notice for Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics, then proceed to the detailed marksheet or online result page.

links.label: Result Notice for B.Tech 7th Semester (Regular and Repeater), 2025
Result Notice of M.Sc 1st and 3rd (Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics) End Semester Examination, Nov-Dec 2025 (JIST)

sections.heading: How to Download ASTU Exam Result 2026

content.text: Students can check ASTU Exam Result 2026 online through the official ASTU results section. In most cases, candidates need to open the relevant result notice first and then follow the result server link to enter their roll number, registration number or date of birth to view the marksheet.

items: Visit the official ASTU result portal - https://astu.ac.in/?page_id=116.
Find the latest result notice for your course, such as B.Tech 7th Semester or M.Sc 1st and 3rd Semester Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics.
Click on the relevant result notice link.
Follow the instructions in the notice to open the online result server if provided.
Enter your roll number, registration number or other required details.
Submit the details to view your ASTU result on the screen.
Download or print the marksheet and verify all subject-wise marks and result status carefully.

structured_links.label: Result Notice for B.Tech 7th Semester (Regular and Repeater), 2025
Result Notice of M.Sc 1st and 3rd (Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics) End Semester Examination, Nov-Dec 2025 (JIST)
